title: Keypress Express
description:
All aboard your keyboard.Keypress Express is a cozy desktop companion where your everyday typing powers a hand-drawn train across the countryside. Whether you are working, writing, coding, or chatting, every keystroke helps your locomotive travel a little faster.

Your train lives in a slim overlay at the bottom of your screen, quietly rolling alongside your day without stealing focus. There is no separate game window to babysit and no pressure to keep typing. Even when you take a break, your train continues steadily toward its destination.

Turn typing into travelYour keyboard is the throttle. Typing accelerates your train up to the speed its engine can handle, while lighter days become slower, more leisurely journeys.

Send your train on a trip, get back to whatever you were doing, and glance down occasionally to watch it pass through rolling hills, farms, forests, wildflower fields, and small country stations.

Build your perfect trainCollect a growing roster of lovingly hand-drawn locomotives and rolling stock. Combine engines with coal hoppers, oil tankers, log cars, passenger coaches, livestock cars, and more.

Every engine has its own balance of speed and hauling capacity. Start with a modest locomotive and a single car, then work your way toward faster engines and long, impressive consists stretching across your desktop.

Plan profitable routesEach town produces different goods, and every market values cargo differently. Load up where supplies are plentiful, deliver them where demand is high, and plan routes that keep every leg of the journey profitable.

The right destination can turn an ordinary shipment into a valuable haul—but repeatedly flooding the same market will reduce its value. Expand your railway, explore new destinations, and build a trade network that crosses the country.

Grow your railway empireComplete trips, sell cargo, and reinvest your earnings in:

• New steam engines
• More cargo and passenger cars
• Longer, higher-capacity trains
• Station upgrades
• New routes and destinations

Progress at the pace of your own workday. A busy afternoon might send your train racing across the map, while a quiet day becomes a peaceful journey through the countryside.

A companion, not a distractionKeypress Express is designed to remain ambient and unobtrusive. It fades out of the way when you move your mouse over it and can be hidden whenever you need a completely clear desktop.

There are no timers demanding your attention, no punishments for stepping away, and no window constantly fighting for focus. Just the quiet satisfaction of watching your railway grow alongside the work you were already doing.

Private by designKeypress Express counts how many keys you press—never which keys you press.

Your words are never read or recorded. The game does not collect the contents of anything you type.

Free to playEvery destination, engine, and part of the core progression can be unlocked through play. Optional purchases can accelerate upgrades, but they are never required to build your railway empire.
description_short: A cozy desktop train that runs on your keystrokes. The more you type, the farther your hand-drawn locomotive rolls along the bottom of your screen — sell the haul, buy bigger engines and longer trains, and grow a railroad empire while you work. Counts keystrokes only, never what you type.
